title: kb.entry.updated v1
description: Emitted by kb (src/kb_ops/entry.rs:269) after any `kb entry update` (body/frontmatter edit), including title-change-driven file renames. Source: /kb.

title.description: Entry title after update, from frontmatter.

project.description: Entry project after update, from frontmatter.

file.description: Path of the (possibly renamed) markdown file after update.

archived.description: Archived flag after update, from frontmatter.
